title: DataTable Renderer
description: Interactive data table for cell output. Renders DataFrames with sorting, filtering, pagination, and lazy column profiling.

enabled.title: Enable auto-rendering
enabled.description: Automatically intercept DataFrame and tabular cell output and render as an interactive DataTable.

htmlInterception.title: Intercept HTML tables
htmlInterception.description: Parse <table> output from R, Julia, SQL magic and render via DataTable. Disable if you prefer the default JupyterLab HTML renderer for non-Python kernels.

theme.title: Color theme
theme.description: Sync with JupyterLab or force a specific theme for the DataTable renderer.

defaultPageSize.title: Default page size
defaultPageSize.description: Number of rows to display per page. Users can override this per-table at runtime.

maxClientRows.title: Max client-side fallback rows
maxClientRows.description: When the server extension is unavailable, this limits how many rows are shipped in the MIME bundle for client-side pagination. Lower values reduce notebook file size.

keyboardNav.title: Keyboard navigation
keyboardNav.description: Enable ← → arrow keys for page navigation, Home/End for first/last page.

lazyProfiles.title: Lazy-load column profiles
lazyProfiles.description: Fetch column statistics and distribution histograms on demand when you hover or click a column header, rather than computing all profiles up front.

showColumnTypes.title: Show column type badges
showColumnTypes.description: Display type indicators (# Numeric, Aa String, ◷ Date, ⊘ Bool) in column headers.

showDistributions.title: Show inline distributions
showDistributions.description: Display sparkline histograms and bar charts in column headers after profiling.

compactHeaders.title: Compact column headers
compactHeaders.description: Reduce header height by hiding inline distributions. Type badges and sort indicators remain visible.

cacheMaxEntries.title: Max cached DataFrames
cacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of DataFrame references held in the server LRU cache. Older entries are evicted when this limit is reached. Environment variable: DT_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES.

cacheTTL.title: Cache TTL (seconds)
cacheTTL.description: Time-to-live before a cache entry becomes eligible for eviction. Set higher for long exploratory sessions. Environment variable: DT_CACHE_TTL.
